import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  let text = io.read_to_end()
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(text)
  mut keys: List<String> = []
  mut counts: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = tokens.len()
  while i < n
    match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(tok)
      mut found = -1
      mut j = 0
      let m = keys.len()
      while j < m
        match keys.get(j)
        when Some(k)
          if found == -1 and k == tok
            found = j
          end
        when None
          ()
        end
        j = j + 1
      end
      if found == -1
        keys = __list_push_string(keys, tok)
        counts = list.push(counts, 1)
      else
        mut new_counts: List<Int> = []
        mut p = 0
        let cm = counts.len()
        while p < cm
          match counts.get(p)
          when Some(c)
            if p == found
              new_counts = list.push(new_counts, c + 1)
            else
              new_counts = list.push(new_counts, c)
            end
          when None
            ()
          end
          p = p + 1
        end
        counts = new_counts
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  mut best_idx = 0
  mut best_count = 0
  mut k = 0
  let km = counts.len()
  while k < km
    match counts.get(k)
    when Some(c)
      if c > best_count
        best_count = c
        best_idx = k
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    k = k + 1
  end

  match keys.get(best_idx)
  when Some(tok)
    print("top=#{tok}=#{best_count}")
  when None
    print("top==0")
  end
end
